metadata.description: A single SNMP MIB object encoded as an OID, ASN.1 type, and value. Corresponds to TLV 11 (SNMP MIB Object) which carries a BER-encoded varbind in the binary config file.
SNMP object identifier in dotted-decimal notation
ASN.1 type of the SNMP value
The SNMP value as a string representation appropriate for the given type
